medical_history.chief_complaint: "I'm doing OK, I mean I guess I'm OK"
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Patient sent to ER due to concerns of developing mania after self-discontinuing medications approximately ___ weeks ago. Reports stopping medications due to bad side effects, including weight gain and diabetes. Recent positive response to clozapine noted.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Diagnosis of bipolar disorder, type I; multiple recent hospitalizations; prior psychiatric inpatient hospitalizations for mania with psychotic features; history of chronic kidney injury.
